subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath illumined the horizon of existence with the light of prostration before the Lord, the All-Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن انار افق الوجود بنور السجود للرب الودود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
